productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarfly Black Sports Shoes
description: The nike LunarFly+ 2 running shoe is designed to offer a stable ride with plush cushioning. A take off on the LunarFly, this shoe offers an enhanced Fit and support with a bolder and more modern look. With absolute Lunarlon cushioning and a more robust heel counter than the LunarFly, this shoe works great for underpronators and mild overpronators, while its Dynamic Support function adapts to every stride the runner takes. Upper• Heavily meshed upper with synthetic overlays for absolute breathable comfort and durability• Updated overlay on the midfoot for enhanced support• Meshed and padded tongue with a lace-up system for snug fit and comfort• Inner bootie that wraps around the foot offering breathable, snug comfort• Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort• Swoosh overlays on the sides for enhanced shoe structure• Reflective material on the toe and heel region for easy visibility in low light conditionsMidsole• Phylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption• Lunarlon cushioning encased in a supportive foam carrier for unique, lightweight ultra-plush cushioning and springy responsive support• Dynamic Support system that adapts to every stride you take• Robust heel counter for an improved fitOutsole• Durable mixed-rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs throughout for absolute grip and traction• Flex grooves for smooth flexibility and an efficient ride• Hell scoop for cushioned comfort and impact protection• nike+ Ready which makes it compatible with various Nike+ productsShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
